scripts.dev: bun run dev:ports; bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n frontend,encore,generate -c blue,green,yellow "bun run frontend" "bun run encore" "bun run watch"
scripts.watch: bun -e "await Bun.sleep(3000)" && bun run --cwd backend generate:watch
scripts.mobile: cd frontend && export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" && bun run mobile
scripts.store: cd frontend && export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" && bun run store
scripts.apk: cd frontend && export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" && bun run apk
scripts.secret: cd backend && encore secret set --type local,dev,prod
